name: Quiche Crusts
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cooked brown rice, softened butter, chopped onion, basil, and beaten egg.
2. Press the mixture into the bottom and sides of a greased 9-inch pie plate.
3. Use any quiche filling desired; tuna flavor pairs well with this crust.
4. Protein: 12.5 grams; Calories: 570 (from Whole Foods For The Whole Family Cookbook).
